creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unclear what underlying FreeBSD GhostBSD was running at the time.

If this is reproducible with an up-to-date FreeBSD version (11.3, 12.1, CURRENT) please re-open this issue with additional details.

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2013-December/047585.html
